paragraph: Executive Valuation Report Summary for a residential apartment located at The Fairways North Tower, The Views, Al Thanyah Third, Dubai. The property is under freehold tenure, with a built-up area of 1,547 square feet and 2 bedrooms. The estimated market value is AED 3,750,000 and market rent is AED 200,000 per annum, based on a physical inspection conducted on 8th November 2025, using the Market Approach. The client is the Commercial Bank of Dubai and the report was prepared for Felicity Stokes and Giles Loren Menezes.
